channel.title: SD on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in SD on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: South Dakota Department of Corrections (SD)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and South Dakota Department of Corrections.

Model: JEM Signed: July 25, 2025 County: State: SD FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Centerville Police Department (SD)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Centerville Police Department.

Model: TFM Signed: January 26, 2026 County: Turner County State: SD FIPS: 46125

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Brown County Jail — Brown, SD
